top_signals.title: Southeast Asia Enjoys Some Inflation Relief as Oil Prices Ease
top_signals.summary: Inflation has decelerated in the Philippines and Thailand as global crude costs eased, giving their central banks more breathing room as they assess the need to further raise interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Takaichi still highly popular despite slide in approval ratings
top_signals.summary: The lower ratings in two of three recent media polls come amid concerns over rising prices and the availability of crude oil-derived naphtha due to the Middle East conflict.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hurricanes rally past Golden Knights in Game 2 of Stanley Cup Final
top_signals.summary: The Hurricanes won their sixth overtime game of this year's Stanley Cup playoffs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
